title: CHIEF MINISTER LEH UNION MINISTER OF POWER & MoHUA INKAWM
content:
771/2026-2027

Aizawl the 29th May 2026 :Vawiin tlai khan Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan a Bangla-ah Mizoram tlawha lo zin mek Pu Manohar Lal Khattar, Union Minister, Power, Housing & Urban Affairs chu a kawm a, Power lama Mizoram hmasawnna tur thilte leh Thenzawl Peace City chungchangte a sawipui.

Chief Minister hian, New Delhi-a Pu Manohar Lal Khattar-in a lo sawipui tawh thin Darzo Lui Pump Storage Project chungchang te, Power Evacuation Line Mizoramin a mamawh belh dan te, RDSS hnuaia hmalak mek te, Rooftop Solar installation lama hmalakna te a sawipui a. A enkawl Ministry hnuaia 10% GBS hmanga Mizorama hmalakna kalpui turin a lo ngen bawk.

Chief Minister hian, MoHUA atanga Thenzawl Peace City dinna tur bultanna Master Plan thawhna tur a pek avangin lawmthu a hrilh a. Tluang taka hmalakna a kal thu a lo hrilh a. Union Minister hian Chief Minister thil thlente hi a theih anga a lo bawhzui tur thu a sawi a ni.

Chief Minister hi Pu F. Rodingliana, Power Minister chuan a tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: UNION MINISTER SHRI MANOHAR LAL HOVIN UD&PA LEH P&E DEPARTMENT HMALAKNA THLIR HO A NI
content:
770/2026-2027Aizawl dated the 29th May 2026:Vawiin khan MINECO Conference hall-ah Ministry of Power leh Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs changtu Union Minister Shri Manohar Lal kaihhruaiin State Review Meeting of Power and Housing & Urban Affairs, Mizoram neih a ni. He meeting-ah hian UD&PA Minister Pu K.Sapdanga leh P&E Minister Pu F.Rodinglianate'n an telpui a. Urban Development & Poverty Alleviation Department leh Power & Electricity Department-a thawktute he hunah hian an tel bawk a ni.

Union Minister Shri Manohar Lal chuan kawphetha hman man khawn chungchanga harsatna awmte chu zirchianga, hman man kim taka khawn chhuah a nih theih nan a tul anga hma la turin Power & Electricity Department-a thawktute chu a chah a. Smart Meter vuah kawngah Sawrkar building leh sumdawnna hmun lian atanga kalpui tan a pawimawh thu leh, kawphetha hman man tha taka khawn chhuah a nih theih nan Pre-paid kalpuinaah 'Security deposit' kalpui tel a pawimawh thu a sawi. Union Minister chuan kawphetha chu ram hmasawnna tura hmanraw pawimawh tak a nih angin kawphetha renchem thiam leh siam chhuahna kawngah ruahmanna tha neih a tul thu a tarlang a. Nizung hmanga kawphetha siam chhuah chu uar deuh deuh turin Power & Electricity Department-a hotute chu a chah a. Mizoram lui pathum, Tlawng, Tuivai leh Chhimtuipuia Hydro Electric Power plant siam tura ruahmanna kalpui dan tur pawh, P&E Minister Pu F.Rodingliana nen Delhi-ah sawi zui pui a tum thu a tarlang bawk a ni.

Shri Manohar Lal chuan UP&PA leh P&E Department thawktute a kawm zawh hian thutharthehdarhtute a kawm a. Swacch Bharat Mission (SBM) kum 10 kalpui a nih tawh thu leh chumi chhung chuan Mizoram chuan Open Defecation Free mai piah lamah ODF + dinhmun a luah mek thu tarlangin, bawlhhlawh sawngbawl kawnga sawt zawka hmalakna kalpui dan turte sawiho a nih thu a sawi a. Khawpui vawn fai, bawlhhlawh thliar hran leh faina leh thianghlimna kawnga hmasawnna a thlen zel theih nan Sawrkar laipui atangin puih an inhuam reng thu a sawi a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawm ah hian Mizoram kawlphetha dinhmun sawi ho niin, Mizoram chhunga Smart Metre vuah tawh zat hi bituk zat atangin za zelah 18 zawh fel tawh a ni a . Revamped Distribution Sector Scheme (RDSS) hnuaiah state grid tihchak hna kalpui mek a nih thu tarlan a ni a. Chung hmalaknate chuan Smart Meter vuah tura bituk zat 2,92,081 zinga 52,886 smart meters vuah tawh niin, 18.01% hna thawh zawh a nih thu te, Prepaid meter conversion programme bul tan nan P&E Department office atanga hmalak a nih thu te tarlan a ni a. Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) pawh tihfel tep a ni tawh thu leh hemi hnu hian prepaid hmang hmasa apiang tan 2% rebate pek tel a nih tur thu tarlan a ni.

Attachment

title: SERCHHIP DISTRICT CONSUMER ASSOCIATION-TEN BHARTI GAS SUPPLY CHATLAK CHUNGCHANG DISTRICT MAGISTRATE HNENAH THLEN
content:
769/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 29th May 2026:Serchhip District Consumer Association-te chuan vawiin khan Bharti Gas supply hmuh tur a awm tak loh avanga consumer-te harsatna tawh mek chungchang chu Serchhip District Magistrate hnenah an thlen a. Hemi chungchang hi DC chamber-ah sawi ho niin Bharti Gas aiawh leh District Consumer Association lam atangin Secretary te an tel a ni.

Bharti Gas hian a tirah supply tha tak nei thin mah se, tunah erawh gas pek tur an neih tawh loh avangin consumerte’n harsatna an tawk mek a. Vawiin meeting-ah hian Consumer Association-te rawtna anga consumer-te’n an gas cylinder-te pek let a, an lo insenral tawhnate pek let ni se tih chu Serchhip Bharti Gas dealer-te chinfel theih piahlam thil a nih avang leh Court case kallai anih avangin Court thutlukna ngaihchan ni se tia rel a ni a. Bharti gas agency-te chuan karleh June ni 6 chhungin an consumer list-te an submit ang a, Bharti Gas consumer-te chuan July thla chhungin, Bharti gas ten  collection centre an siamah, an cylinder-te, consumer card telin submit ni se tia rel ni bawkin; Bharti gas cylinder leh Indane /mizofed cylinder nena lo thleng kual tawhte pawh felfai taka chhinchiah ni se tia rel a ni bawk.

Vawiin meeting-ah hian gas supply ti chingpen leh dan bawhchhetute chu LPG (Regulation and Distribution) Order, 2000 leh Section 7 of Essential Commodities Act (ECA), 1955 tlawhchhanin hremna theih an nih thu sawilan a ni bawk.

Bharti Gas hi Guwahati based niin, April 2020 khan Serchhipah an inbun a, consumer 395 an awm. Mizoram chhungah dealer 9 awmin hun eng emaw chen kalta atang khan supply an hmuh tak loh avangin dealers-te hian harsatna an tawk mek a,  lungawilohna lanttirin Court-ah thubuai an thehlut a, court case a kal mek a ni.

Attachment

title: HIV/AIDS VANGA BORAL TE HRIATRENGNA HUN HMANG
content:
768/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 29th May, 2026 :Vawiin khan Positive Women Network Of Mizoram (PWNM) chuan HIV/AIDS vanga boralte hriatrengna hun International AIDS Candlelight Memorial Service chu Mission Vengthlang Kohhran Golden Jubilee Hall-ah an hmang a, Minister Pi Lalrinpuii, Health and Family Welfare Department chuan khuallian niin hun a hmanpui.

Minister chuan Positive Women Network Of Mizoram-te HIV/AIDS vanga harsatna tawkte tanpui tura an awm chu a lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, HIV/AIDS vanga boral tawh te chu hriatreng an nih thu a sawi a, harsatna tawk mekte pawh an lungngaihna leh manganna hriatsak an nih thu sawiin, damdawi leh eitur tha zawk an neih zel theihna tura theihtawp chhuah zel turin kalkhawmte a chah bawk a ni.

Dr. Jane Ralte Project Director, MSACS pawhin thu sawiin kalkhawmte chu thawhhopuiah a sawm a. Kohhran ten PWNM-te an support tlat avanga lawmthu sawiin, tun aia nasa zawka HIV laka invenna leh inenkawlna lamah nasa zawka inzirtirna kan neih a la tul thu a sawi bawk.

Kalkhawmna hunah hian mi pahnih hnenah chawimawina hlan a ni a, Dr. Lalrempuii, Head of Department ICTC chu HIV Positive-te tana a thawh nasat vang leh Mizoram a Quality HIV testing tih a nih theih nana a hma lakna vanga hlan a ni a, pakhat hi Pu John Thansanga, Project Director, Samaritan Society niin, Drug Addict leh HIV Positive-te tan a hun pum pea a thawh that em avanga hlan a ni.

Mizoram chhunga kohhran pawl hrang hrang, NGO aiawh te, PWNM member leh Client te hun hman naah hian an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Chief Minister Hosts Joshua Van at His Office
content:
126/2026-2027

Aizawl, 29th May 2026 :Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma this afternoon hosted UFC Flyweight Champion Joshua Van, who is currently visiting Mizoram, at his office.

Welcoming Joshua Van to Mizoram, the Chief Minister expressed his appreciation for the visit and stated that the fighter’s remarkable achievements have become a great source of inspiration for Mizo youth. He also conveyed his best wishes for a pleasant stay in the state.

Speaking briefly on the occasion, Joshua Van said, “The Mizo people should know that they now have their own UFC Champion. I consider Mizoram my home, and I regard the people here as my brothers and sisters.” He also thanked the Chief Minister for taking time out of his busy schedule to meet him.

The Chief Minister was accompanied by Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Sports Minister, and Lt. Col. Clement Lalhmingthanga, MLA.

Attachment

title: Lunglei District-a Special Intensive Revision kalpui mek chungchangah DEO hovin official-te an ṭhu khawm
content:
766/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭomir thla ni 29:Vawiin khan Lunglei District Election Officer Pi Navneet Mann hovin a hna thawh pindanah Election official-te, Electoral Registration Officer (ERO) leh Assistant ERO-te, District Media Nodal Officer (DMNO) leh Assistant DMNO te an ṭhu khawm a. Lunglei District-a ngawrh zawka electoral roll siam ṭhat runpui, Special Intensive Revision (SIR) kalpui meka inbuatsaihna hrang hrang thlir hovin, hlawhtling taka SIR kalpui a nih theih nana thil pawimawh hrang hrang leh hmachhawpte an sawi ho.

DEO Pi Navneet Mann chuan SIR chu thil thleng zen zen lo a nih avangin tun ṭuma mi hi remchang leh tawn hriat ṭha tak a nih thu sawiin, SIR chu ngaih pawimawh hmasakah neih a, a hlawhtlin nan phur tak leh thatho taka hma la turin mawhphurhna hrang hrang neitute chu a chah a. Electoral roll-a chuang thei dik takte hmaih an nih lohna tur leh a chuang lo turte an chuan lohna turin fimkhur tak leh uluk taka hma la turin mawhphurtute a chah.

He hunah hian SIR kalpui meka May ni 30 aṭanga June ni 28, 2026 inkar chhunga electoral roll-a chuang tawhte chanchin kimchang lak khawmna (enumeration) kalpui tura ruahmanna thlir ho a ni a. Inbuatsaihna peih fel tawh niin, BLO training pawh buatsaih tawh a ni a. Voter-te chanchin chhinchhiahna tur Enumeration Form chu Booth Level Officer (BLO) te kutah hlan fel tawh niin, May ni 30 aṭangin BLO-te'n in tin tlawh chhuakin Enumeration Form hi an sem dawn a. Voter-te chanchin dah khah hnuah la khawm lehin, online portal-ah an chhu lut ang a. Chumi hmang chuan draft electoral roll buatsaih a ni ang.

Enumeration Form sem leh lak khawm chungchangah felfai zawka kalpui a nih theih nan polling station tina voter tam dan azirin hunbi tiam siam a ni a. Hemi mil hian BLO-te hma lak dan chu vil leh en zui turin ruahmanna siam a ni.

He hunah hian SIR kalpui meka media kal tlanga hma lakna tur ruahmanna (Media SOP) sawi ho ni bawkin, SIR kaihhnawih hma lakna hrang hrang chu media kal tlangin a zau thei ang bera puanzar dan kawng zawn ni se, tih a ni a. Inbiak pawhna leh internet ṭha lo avanga harsatna awm thei sut kian dan tur te, hlawhtling taka SIR kalpui a nih theih nana thil pawimawh hrang hrangte sawi ho a ni bawk.

SIR kalpui mek kah hian Electoral Roll hi a thar hlaka buatsaih a nih dawn avangin Enumeration Form theh lutte hming chauh Draft Roll-ah a chuang dawn a. Draft Roll-a hming chuang ve lote chuan a hranin July ni 5, 2026 aṭanga August ni 4, 2026 chhungin ERO/AERO hnenah document dangte nen Roll-a luh dilna an theh luh a, a hrana hearing neih leh a ngai dawn a. Final Electoral Roll hi September ni 6, 2026-ah tihchhuah tur a ni.

Lunglei District-a Special Intensive Revision chungchanga zawh duh nei tan Toll Free Number 1950-ah emaw, ERO Office leh District Level-a Help Desk-ah emaw zawh fiah theih a ni.

Lunglei District hi Assembly Constituency parukah ṭhen niin, tun dinhmunah voter 1,02,772 an awm mek a. Polling Station 180 awmin, BLO mi 180 leh BLO Supervisor mi 29 an awm mek a. Assembly Constituency paruk — 30-Lunglei North, 31-Lunglei East, 32-Lunglei West, 33-Lunglei South, 34-Thorang leh 35-West Tuipui te hi ERO leh AERO pakhat zelin an enkawl a ni.

Attachment

title: Mizoram Governor Interacts with Post Matric Scheduled Tribe Scholarship Beneficiaries
content:
125/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 29th May, 2026 :Mizoram Governor, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), interacted with beneficiaries of the Post Matric Scheduled Tribe Scholarship Scheme at Durbar Hall, Lok Bhavan today. The special interaction was organised under the Janjatiya Garima Utsav 2026 as part of the ‘Birsa Lives in New Bharat Week’.

During the programme, the Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh appreciated the students for candidly sharing their experiences and challenges. He emphasised that the scholarship is not merely financial assistance but a vital instrument of affirmative action for the empowerment of tribal communities. He assured the gathering that the Central Government is making concerted efforts for the overall development and welfare of tribal youth across the country. He encouraged the students to act as ambassadors of government initiatives by spreading awareness about various tribal scholarships and welfare schemes in their respective communities. He also stressed the importance of strengthening premier educational institutions such as Eklavya Model Residential Schools, Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalayas and Kendriya Vidyalayas to enhance the quality of tribal education.

Highlighting inspiring tribal icons, the Governor recalled the legacy of Bhagwan Birsa Munda and Mizo tribal warriors like Lalnu Ropuiliani and Pasaltha Khuangchera. He urged the students, who represent the future of the nation, to fully embrace the Digital India initiative, minimise dependence on paperwork, study diligently, prepare sincerely for examinations and remain responsible towards their families, state and nation. He also advised them to cultivate a spirit of service and helping others.

The students expressed heartfelt gratitude to the Government for the Post Matric Scheduled Tribe Scholarship Scheme, noting that it has been particularly beneficial for students from rural and economically backward areas. They thanked the Governor for providing them a valuable platform to share their views and acknowledged that the scholarship not only motivates them to excel academically but also reflects the government’s commitment to public welfare.

The students also highlighted certain difficulties, including delays in the disbursement of scholarship funds, which often reach them very late, affecting timely payment of admission fees, purchase of textbooks and other essential expenses. They pointed out that the current scholarship amount has remained unchanged despite the rising cost of education, making it insufficient to meet actual needs. They further requested a more user-friendly online application system with improved internet connectivity, smoother Aadhaar-bank linking processes and the setting up of dedicated help desks at bank branches. The students also suggested conducting regular awareness campaigns through educational institutions and community platforms, especially in rural areas and minimising/ removing the financial burden associated with the application and submission process.

Dr. C. Laldawngliana, Secretary of the Mizoram Scholarship Board (MSB), delivered the welcome address, while Mr. Joseph L. Hauhnar, Under Secretary of MSB, gave a detailed presentation on the Post Matric Scheduled Tribe Scholarship Scheme.

At the conclusion of the programme, the students submitted their suggestions and feedback in writing as per the Governor’s instructions.

Attachment

title: Mizoram Larsap-in Post Matric Scheduled Tribe Scholarship dawngtu zirlaite a kawm
content:
765/2026-2027Aizawl, the 29th May, 2026 :Mizoram Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chuan vawiin khan Post Matric Scheduled Tribe Scholarship Scheme hnuaia hamthatna dawngtu zirlaite chu Durbar Hall, Lok Bhavan-ah a kawm. He inkawmhona hi Janjatiya Garima Utsav 2026 hnuaia "Birsa Lives in New Bharat Week" kaltlanga buatsaih a ni.

Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan Post Matric Tribal Scholarship Scheme chungchangah zirlai ten lang tlang taka an tawnhriat leh harsatna tawhte a hnena an thlen chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, scholarship chu sum leh paia inpuihna mai ni lo, mawhphurhna kengtel a nih thu a sawi a. Sawrkar laipuiin tribal-te hmasawn nan theihtawp a chhuah thu sawiin, zirlaite chu tribal scholarship leh scheme dangte midangte hrilh hriaa theh darhtu Ambassador nih tum turin a fuih a. Tribal-te zirna chawisan nan school tha tak tak Eklavya Model Residential School, Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya leh Kendriya Vidyalaya-te chhawr tangkai a tul thu a sawi bawk.

Larsap chuan tribal mihuaisen Bhagwan Birsa Munda chanchin entawntlak tak takte tarlangin, Mizote pawhin hetiang anga tribal mihuaisen lar tak tak Lalnu Ropuiliani, Pasaltha Khuangchera leh adangte kan neih thu a sawi a. Ram innghahna zirlaite chu Digital India hmalakna ngaipawimawha lehkha phek hman ti tlem turin a chah a. Scholarship chuan kentel a neih thu sawiin, lehkha zir taimak, entawntlak taka nun leh exam tura tha taka inpuahchahte, chhungkua, state leh ram dah pawimawhte bakah midang puih duhna putte a kentel thu a sawi bawk.

Zirlaite chuan Post Matric Scheduled Tribe Scholarship Scheme siamtu Sawrkar chungah lawmthu sawiin, abik takin chhungkaw harsa leh thingtlanga chengte tan a tangkai lehzual thu an sawi a. An tawnhriat leh harsatna neihte sawi chhuah theihna hun tha tak siam saktu Larsap chungah lawmthu an sawi bawk a. Scholarship chuan result tha nei tura mawhphurhna a pek mai bakah sawrkar scheme duante chu mipui hamthatna tur a ni tih an hriat chian lehzual thu an sawi a ni.

Larsap hnena zirlai ten harsatna an thlen zingah hian a hun taka scholarship a lut thin lo chuan admission fee, zirlaibu leina leh tul dangah harsatna a thlen thute, zirna senso sang zela scholarship pung ve se an duh thute, online application awlsam leh rang zawk bakah Aadhaar leh bank account thlunzawma harsatna tawhte an thlen a. Scholarship bik buaipuina tur help desk bank branch zawng zawnga dah an duh thute, tribal zirlai ST Scholarship dawng theite hmaih an awm loh nan awareness campaign nasa zawka neih tha an tih thute bakah, form submit laia senso awmte tih bo emaw, tih tlem nise an duh thute an thlen a ni.

He hunah hian Dr. C. Laldawngliana, Secretary, Mizoram Scholarship Board (MSB) chuan inlawmna thu a sawi a. Pu Joseph L. Hauhnar, Under Secretary, MSB hnen atangin Post Matric Scheduled Tribe Scholarship Scheme chungchang ngaihthlak a ni a. Programme zawh hnu hian Larsap thurawn angin zirlai ten lehkha phekah an ngaimawh zawngte ziakin an thlen a ni.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER-IN JOSHUA VAN THINGPUI INPUI
content:
764/2026-2027

Aizawl the 29th May 2026:Vawiin tlai khan Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan a office-ah Joshua Van, UFC Fly Weight Champion lai, Mizoram tlawha lo zin chu thingpui a inpui a. Mizoram a rawn tlawh avanga lawmthu hrilhin, a hlawhtlinna ropui chuan Mizo thalaite nasa takin a fuih thu a hrilh. Mizorama a cham chhunga hun nuam tak hmang turin duhsakna a hlan bawk.

Joshua Van pawhin thu tawi sawiin, "Mizo mipuiten UFC Champion in neiah lo inngai rawh u. Mizoram hi ka ram anga ka ngaih, ka unaute anga ka en in ni", a ti a. Hun chep tak kara inhmuhna hun a buatsaihsak avangin Chief Minister hnenah hian lawmthu a sawi a ni.

Chief Minister hi Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Sports Minister leh Lt. Col. Clement Lalhmingthanga, MLA ten an tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: Mamit-ah World No Tobacco Day hmang
content:
763/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 29th of May, 2026 :Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah Pu Suvigya S Chandra, Chairman, District Level Task Force (Tobacco Control)/ District Bawrhsap hovin World No Tobacco Day hman a ni.

Pu Suvigya chuan kan taksa hriselna atan zuk leh hmuam laka kan fihlim a tul takzeta, tul lova sum khawhralna leh kan taksa hriselna tichhetu zuk leh hmuam do turin district mipuite a chah a, a bikin kum lama la naupang zawkte fihlim tura zirtirna kalpui chu thil pawimawh tak niin District Level Task Force (Tobacco Control) te pawh an hmalakna kawngah theihtawpchhuah zel turin a chah.

He hunah hian Pi Lalnunhlimi, Social Worker (NTCP) chuan District Level Task Force (Tobacco Control) hmalak tawhna hrang hrang tarlangin, COTPA dan hnuaia inhumhalhna dan hrang hrangte a tarlang bawk.

World No Tobacco Day - 2026 hi Dr. Saichhingpuii Sailo, Chief Medical Officer chuan kaihruaiin, kum naupang zawkte zuk leh hmuam laka venhim a tul thu a tarlang a ni. He hunah hian District Level Task Force (Tobacco control) member te leh Anti Tobacco Squad member te  an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Lunglei Sr CMO Staff Welfare te'n Lunglei District aṭanga Florence Nightingale Award dawngtute lawmpuina hun an hmang
content:
762/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭomir thla ni 29:Vawiin khan Lunglei District Senior Chief Medical Officer (SCMO) Staff Welfare chuan Lunglei SCMO Conference Hall-ah India ram puma nurse hna thawk ṭha chawimawina, National Florence Nightingale Award dawngtute – Pi Vanlalthuami (Health Supervisor, Ayush Health & Wellness Centre, Theiriat) leh Pi Lalenthangi Hnamte (Health Worker, Ayush Health & Wellness Centre, Tuichawng) te pualin lawmpuina hun an buatsaih.

District TB Officer Dr K. Lalhmachhuana'n hun kaihruaiin, Pu H. Lalthangliana'n hunserh a hmang a. Lunglei SCMO Dr Lalrinthangi chuan Lunglei District aṭanga India ram pum huapa hna thawk ṭha chawimawina dawng thei an awm chu chhuanawm leh lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, mi dang pawhin entawn zel turin a chah a. Hriselna lama thawktute chu mipuite tan an pawimawhna hre chiang a, mahni hna ṭheuh rinawm leh ṭhahnem ngai taka thawk zel turin a fuih bawk.

Award dawngtute hi SCMO Staff Welfare hmingin chawimawina thuziak leh thilpek hlan an ni a. National Florence Nightingale Award 2020 dawngtu Pi Vanlalthuami leh NFNA 2026 dawngtu Pi Lalenthangi Hnamte te chuan an hna thawhna avanga Award dawng theia an awm chu lawmawm an tih thu sawiin, department hotute leh an thawhpuite nena thawh hona ṭha tak an neih vang a nih thu an sawi a. Thawktu hrang hrangin lawmpuina thu sawi bawkin, Deputy CMO Dr Vanlalngheti'n lawm thu sawiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: Mizotaxi app peih fel a ni ta
content:
761/2026-2027

Aizawl the 29th May, 2026:Vawiin khan Secretary State Transport Authority Mizoram chuan thuchhuah siamin Mizoram chhunga Passenger phur chi lirthei-a chuang thin te'n Sorkar approved rate diktak an chawi theihna atana Mizoram leh Digiride Technology Pvt. Ltd., NIT(Mizoram) te tangkawpin an duan Mizotaxi mobile app chu peih fel a ni ta.

Sorkar duhdan angin Aizawl khawpui chhungah bul tan phawt tur a ni ang a, a tahtawlin District dangah pawh kalpui chhoh zel tum a ni.

Aizawl khawpui chhungah hian 'Mizotaxi' app hi July ni 1, 2026 aṭanga hman tan tur a ni a. Chuvangin, Aizawl khawpui chhunga service lai 4-wheeler taxi te, 2-wheeler taxi leh Autorickshaw zawng zawng te chu June 2026 chhungin Mizotaxi Office, DTO(L.A) Office hnuai, Transport Complex, Chaltlangah registration tifel vek tura ngen leh hriattir an ni e.

June 2026 chhunga in register te tan registration fee hi kumkhatah Rs 600/- only (Rs.50/month) a ni ang a, hemi hnulama in register te chu Rs 1000/- an pek a ngai tawh ang.

Mizotaxi application hi playstore/appstore ah download theih turin dahfel a ni tawh a, a hman tan theih hun chu July ni 1, 2026 aṭangin a ni ang.

Attachment

title: ZEBRA CROSSING HMAN DAN TUR CHUNGCHANGA AIZAWL SP THUCHHUAH
content:
760/2026-2027

Aizawl the 29th May, 2026:Aizawl khawpui hmun hrang hrangah mipui kea kalte him zawk nan leh traffic enkawlna a felfai theih zawk nan Zebra Crossing-te Siam a ni a. The Motor Vehicles (Driving) Regulations, 2017 Rule No. 9 leh 22 (iv)-in a sawi angin Lirthei khalhtuten Zebra Crossing thlen dawnin fimkhur taka tlan muana, kawng kan turte tana a hlauhawm leh hlauhawm loh enlawk thin tur a ni.

Zebra Crossing-ah hian lirthei din phal a ni lova, hei hian traffic jam laia din pawh huam vekin pick & drop te, bungrua load leh unload chhungte pawh a huam vek a ni.

June ni 1, 2026 atangin Aizawl Traffic Police-te chuan Zebra Crossing kaihhnawiha dan bawhchhiate lakah na zawkin hma a la ang. Dan bawhchhiate hi The Motor Vehicles (Amendment) Act, 2019 Section 177 & 184 angin hrem theih an ni.

Kea kalte pawh kawng kan dawna fimkhur taka kawngpuite enchiang hmasa thin turin kan inngen a ni.

title: Education Minister Dr. Vanlalthlana Inaugurates Northeast’s First “New Age Tech Skills Centre” in Aizawl
content:
124/2026-2027

Aizawl the 29th May, 2026:School Education Minister Dr. Vanlalthlana today inaugurated the Northeast region’s first-ever “New Age Tech Skills Centre” at Government Comprehensive Model School, Model Veng, Aizawl.

The centre has been established under the Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) initiative of Bharat Forge Ltd., a globally renowned company in the field of forging and defence manufacturing. The project’s technical partner is SimuSoft Technologies, which has taken the lead in setting up the centre, providing training, and developing the curriculum. The initiative is being implemented in collaboration with the School Education Department, Government of Mizoram. The project originated from the CSR workshop organised in Aizawl in June 2025 by the Confederation of Indian Industry and the CSR Cell, Government of Mizoram.

The New Age Tech Skills Centre is the first school-level technology skills lab of its kind in Mizoram and across the Northeast region. With support from Bharat Forge CSR and the technical expertise of SimuSoft Technologies, students will receive training in advanced technologies such as Artificial Intelligence (AI), Robotics, Internet of Things (IoT), 3D Printing, CAD, CNC Simulation, and Drone Technology.

This initiative is an important step towards achieving the objectives of the National Education Policy (NEP) 2020 by bridging classroom learning with practical and industry-relevant technical education. SimuSoft Technologies has also developed specialised AI curriculum materials and textbooks for school students, which were officially launched during the programme.

The programme featured the formal inauguration of the centre along with live demonstrations of AI, robotics, IoT, and simulation technologies.

Several dignitaries attended the programme. Dr. Vanlalthlana attended as Chief Guest, while Dr. Leena Deshpande attended as Guest of Honour. School Education Secretary Pu David Lalthantluanga attended as Special Guest. The programme was chaired by Pi Angela Zothanpuii, Director, School Education. Representatives from various technical institutions were also present at the event.

Attachment

title: Education Minister Dr. Vanlalthlana’n Northeast-a a hmasa ber “New Age Tech Skills Centre” Aizawlah a hawng
content:
759/2026-2027

Aizawl the 29th May, 2026:School Education Minister Dr. Vanlalthlana chuan vawiin khan Government Comprehensive Model School, Model Veng, Aizawl-ah Northeast-a a hmasa ber ni turin “New Age Tech Skills Centre” chu a hawng.

He centre hi Bharat Forge Ltd. CSR (Corporate Social Responsibility) atanga din a ni a. Bharat Forge Ltd. hi forging leh defence siamchhuah lama khawvel hriat hlawh an ni. Project technical partner chu SimuSoft Technologies a ni a, anni hian centre siamremna, training leh curriculum buatsaih lamah hma an la a. School Education Department, Government of Mizoram nen tangkawpin kalpui a ni. He project hi June 2025-a Aizawla Confederation of Indian Industry leh CSR Cell, Government of Mizoram te’n an buatsaih CSR workshop atanga lo intan a ni.

New Age Tech Skills Centre hi Mizoram leh Northeast pumpuiah school level-a technology skills lab hmasa ber a ni a. Bharat Forge CSR support leh SimuSoft Technologies technical expertise hmangin zirlaite chuan Artificial Intelligence (AI), Robotics, Internet of Things (IoT), 3D Printing, CAD, CNC Simulation leh Drone Technology ang chi technology tharte an zir dawn a ni.

He hmalakna hi National Education Policy (NEP) 2020 thiltum tihpuitlinna atan classroom-a zirna leh industry-relevant practical technical education inkara inthlunzawmna pawimawh tak a ni a. SimuSoft Technologies chuan school zirlaite atan AI curriculum leh textbook bik pawh an siam a, chu lehkhabute pawh chu programme-ah hian tlangzarh a ni bawk.

Programme-ah hian centre hawnna neih niin AI, robotics, IoT leh simulation technology a taka entir (live demonstration) neih nghal a ni bawk.

Programme-ah hian mi pawimawh tam tak an tel a. Dr. Vanlalthlana chu khuallian niin Dr. Leena Deshpande chu Khual Zahawm a ni. School Education Secretary Pu David Lalthantluanga chu Special Guest a ni a. Programme hi Pi Angela Zothanpuii, Director of School Education-in a kaihruai a. Technical institution hrang hrang aiawhte pawh an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Minister Prof.Lalnilawma’n a bial chhung a Thingsulthliah Higher Secondary School Freshers Social leh Felicitation hun a hmanpui
content:
758/2026-2027

Thingsulthliah the 29th May, 2026:Prof.Lalnilawma chuan HSSLC Pass chhuak te chu zirna sang zawk leh khawvel zau zawk hmachhawn tura an rilru leh taksa buatsaih turin a fuih a. Hlawhtling turin Pathian tihna nen rinawmna, thawhrimna, tawrhchhelna leh tih hram hramna nun neih a pawimawh a ni, a ti.An thiamna leh finna te Mizoram ram leh hnam, khawtlang hmasawnna atana hlan let ve tura fuihin, chu chu an mawhphurhna a ni tih hre reng turin Minister chuan fuih a. Mizoram mai bakah, India ram emaw khawvel ram zau zawkah zirna chhunzawm emaw hnathawk tur pawhin an la kal ang a, chung hunah chuan harsatna te leh beidawn duh rum rumna te pawh an la tawk thei tih hre tur leh, Pathian chakna rinchhan chungin, tawrhchelna, rinawmna, tumruhna , beidawn duh lohna leh tih hram hramna nun nei turin a fuih a ni.

Minister chuan zirlaite hlawhtlinna bul chu nu leh pa mai bakah Zirtirtute thuawi hi a ni, a ti a. Mizo nun ze mawi - tlawmngaihna leh aia upa zah hi chu nunpui thar zel turin a fuih a ni. Thawhhreh nei lo tura fuihin, rinawm tak leh taima taka an thawh phawt chuan Pathianin mal a sawm zel ang tiin zirlai kalkhawm te Prof Lalnilawma chuan a fuih a ni.

Thingsulthliah HSS atang hian HSSLC result hnuhnung berah zirlai candidate 58 neiin, pass parcentage 96.5 an nei a ni.

Thingsulthliah Higher Secondary school hi kum 2004 ah khawtlangin an din a, kum 2008 khan lumpsump ah awmin, tunah hian Sawrkarin Special Category 2 ah hlankai a ni. Tunah hian Zirlai naupang 156 nei mekin, Teaching Staff 11, Office Assistant 1 leh Neilit Staff 1 thawktu an awm mek.Khaw thum VC heng, Thingsulthliah, Seling leh Thingsul-Tlangnuam te’n lungrual taka din niin, he Sikul ah hian Thingsulthliah, Seling leh Tlangnuam mai bakah Sesawng , CTI, Mualmam leh Thingtlang khaw dang atangin kumtin zirlai an nei thin a ni.

Attachment

title: Mizoramah World No Tobacco Day hman a ni
content:
757/2026-2027

29th May, 2026:Kumin World No Tobacco Day May ni 31, Pathinni (Sunday)- a a tlak avangin Mizoramah chuan vawiin khan hman a ni a. World No Tobacco Day ah hian World Health Organization (WHO) theme thlan chu “Unmasking the appeal – countering nicotine and tobacco addiction” tih a ni. He hun hi National Tobacco Control Programme Mizoram te buatsaihin District hrang hrangah hman a ni.

World No Tobacco Day hi Aizawl-ah chuan DHME Auditorium ah hman a ni a, he hun hi Dr. R. Lalchhuanawma, Mission Director, National Health Mission, Mizoram chuan kaihhruaiin, thawktute chu Health care providers (Doctor, nurse, HW etc) kan nih angin mahni fihlim thei ila, Health facility te 100% tobacco Free ni zel thei se, Home visit etc kan neih thin na ah te zirtirna uar zel ila, Generation thar (Tobacco Free) kan neih theihna turin tan lak a pawimawh, a ti.

Pu R. Lalremruata, State Consultant, NTCP chuan WNTD theme hmangin presentation a pe a, Health Dept-a thawktu te, Teachers, Dan kengkawhtu te leh Ngo pawl hrang hrangah Zuk leh hmuam that loh zia inzirtirna training vawi 107 buatsaih tawh niin Awareness Programme School leh Institution hrang hrangah vawi 204 nei tawh a ni a, meizuk phallohna hmuna meizu mi 7580 man an nih thaw thu a sawi a. E-Cigarette (Vape) chi hrang hrang leh hriselna atana a that loh zia a sawi bawk.

Dr. Zoramthangi Renthlei, State Nodal Officer, NTCP chuan pledge (vaihlo zuk leh hmuam dona lam) kaihhruai a. ISTHM President Pu VL Vela’n thu a sawi a ni.

WHO tarlan danin tobacco industry lam hian thangthar ten vaihlo zuk leh hmuam an hman nachang an hriat theih nan chin dan thar tam tak a rawn chhawp chhuak thin a, hemi laka thangtharte venhim hi a pawimawh tak zet a ni. Kum engemawti atang khan khawvelin vaihlo zuk leh hmuam thatlohna a hria a, a buaipui chhoh atangin vaihlo zuk leh hmuam siamchhuaktute hian thangthar zawk te hip nan leh tihchhin an chak nan a tuamna thlengin mit la thei tur te in an buatsaih ta a. Hemi bakah hian flavor hrang hrangte a siam a ching chho ta a, hei hian thangthar te a hip thei a; nu leh pa ten an fate fihlim tur a hrilh ngun a pawimawh tak zet a ni.

Mizoramah chuan mouth freshner tiin Shikhar ei ching thalai te zingah an tam hle a. Shikhar hian bawm hran pawlh tur a chhawm a, hei hi vaihlo a ni a, a pawlh tello hi chuan an ei tha peih hlawm meuh lo. Vaihlo ah hian nicotine a tel avangin ngaih (addict) a awlsam em em a, hman tawh chuan bansan leh mai a har em em a,tihchhin loh \a him ber. Tunlai khawvelah meizuk bansan nan tiin Electronic Cigarette (E-Cigarette)/Vapes te an siamchhuak a he thilah hian nicotine tello tiin flavor hrang hrang an rawn siamchhuak a, thangtharte zuk leh hmuam hman tanna kailawn a ni thei a ni. Mizoram ngeiah pawh hmang an tam ta em em a. Heng E-cigarette/Vapes te hi Prohibition of Electronic Cigarette Act 2019 hnuaiah India ram pumah zawrh chhuah, sem darh, lakluh etc. khap tlat a ni a; lo zuar ru an awm chuan dan bawhchhia an ni a hrem theih an ni. Vaihlo zuk leh hmuam te hi eng ang pawh a tuam mawi pawh nise hriselna atan a tha lo tih inzirtir uar a tul hle.

Attachment

title: Art & Culture Minister Pu C Lalsawivunga’n MUP Lengkhawm Zai intihsiak programme a hmanpui
content:
756/2026-2027

29th May, 2026 (Zirtawpni) :Vawiin khan Art & Culture Dept leh M.U.P. Gen. Hqrs tangkawp buatsaih M.U.P Lengkhawm Zai Intihsiak 2026 chu Vanapa Hall ah neih a ni a. Art & Culture Minister Pu C Lalsawivunga chu khuallian a ni.

Khuallian Pu C. Lalsawivunga chuan MUP te khawtlang leh ram tana rohlu an ni tih inhrereng turin a chah a. Inkiltawih lo tur, thangtharte kaihruaitu ni turin a fuih a. Zo nun ze mawi - aia upa zah thiam kawngah an tu leh fate kaihruaia, zirtirtu ni tur leh Mizo culture vawng nung zel turin a sawm a ni.

Lengkhawm Zai Intihsiak programme hi vawiin nileng khan neih a ni a. Aizawl khawpui chhunga M.U.P. Area Level a intihsiakna neiha pakhatna theuh Branch 14 te an intihsiak a. Chawhma lam hi intihsiakna hun bik atana hman niin Art & Culture Director Pi Carol VLMS Dawngkimi chuan inkhawm a kaihruai a. Chawhnu lamah result puan leh lawmman semna hun hman a ni.

Mimala lawmman latute chu -

title: SAITUALAH  DISTRICT LEVEL NARCO COORDINATION CENTRE (NCORD) COMMITTEE  THUKHAWM
content:
755/2026-2027

Dated Saitual the 29th May, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Saitualah District Level Narco Co-ordination Committee (NCORD) chu an Chairperson, District Bawrhsap ni bawk Pu Srinivas Sadi kaihhruaiin an thukhawm.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Pu Vivek Kumar Maurya, Member Secretary, NCORD leh SP ni bawk chuan an hmalak tawhna te leh ruihhlo tawlh ruk an man chungchang te leh a tawlhna kawng hrang hrang te bakah NGO te nena an thawhho dan te report a pe a ni.

NCORD Chairperson Pu Srinivas Sadi chuan kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu sawiin District hrang hranga NCORD tha ber ni tura theih tawp chhuah turin a sawm a, ruihhlo dona kawng hrang hranga hmalak chungchangah te leh ruihhlo tawlh tih tlem dan tur te a tarlang a. Bawrhsap chuan ruihhlo avanga hliam tuar mek te chhanchhuahna kawngah theih tawp chhuah turin kalkhawmte a sawm nghal bawk a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian District Level NCORD meeting hmasaa thu relte bawhzui a nih dante leh line department  ten anmahni zawn theuha hma an lakna report-te ngaihthlak a ni a, heng bakah hian ruihhlo tawlhte man leh chhui kawnga hmalakna dan thar ngaihtuahte, ruihhlo tihna hmun hrang hranga random inspection neih dan turte leh high school leh higher zawng zawnga anti-drug club din chungchangte, ruihhlo tih remna kawnga NMBA hmalakna hrang hrangte sawiho a ni bawk.

Vawiin thutkhawm hi Pu Srinivas Sadi, NCORD chairperson & DC chuan a kai hruai a, Pu Vivek Kumar Maurya, Member secretary, NCORD & SP, Pu Tharun Patnaik Madala, SDO (S),  Pu Lalhmingthanga, Asst Commissioner of Excise & Narcotics, Pu Laldingliana , DEO, line Department hrang hrang aiawh, SBI (Ngopa) aiawh, NGO aiawhte bakah NCORD Committee member te an tel a ni.

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP HOVIN  SPECIAL INVESTIGATION TEAM LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT THUTKHAWM
content:
754/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 29th May 2026 :Vawiin khan Special Investigation Team, Lawngtlai District-chuan Deputy Commissioner Office Chamber-ah thutkhawm an nei a. Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan thutkhawm hi a kaihruai.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Member kalkhawmte hnena lawmthu sawina neiin Lawngtlai District- huamchhunga 'Riverine Reserved Forest'  leh Reserved Forest Areas- te venhim leh enkawl chu thil pawimawh tak a ni a, Special Investigation Team - te thahnem ngai taka thawk zel turin a chah a.  hemi kawngah hian theihtawp chhuah a tul hle a ni, a ti. A bik takin Luipui kama rammgaw amwte tihchereu nasat a hlauhawm thu tarlangin, venhmina chak zawka kalpui a tul thu a sawi a. Bawrhsap chuan thahnemngai taka Riverine Reserved Forest leh Reserved Forest Areas- te humhalh a nih tur thu sawiin, LADC, CADC leh Lawngtlai mipuite thawhpuiah a sawm nghal bawk.

Thutkhawmah hian  Riverine Reserved Forest - huamchhunga 'Land Pass ' awm dan zirchianna an neih atanga  'Preliminary Report'  LADC leh CADC ten an siam chu enho a ni a. Preliminary Report - chu pawm tlangin thutkhawm hmasain a lo rel tawh angin Mizoram sawrkarah thehluh ni se an ti a. LADC leh CADC - in Land pass an lo pekchhuah tawhte chu Category A- Prior to 1980 ( Enforcement of Forest Conservation Act); Category B- Between 1980- 2005 ( Enactment of Forest Right Act 2005); Category C- Between 2005- 2010 leh Category D- Post 2011, ah te fel fai taka thliar hrana report hi DC Office- ah thehluh leh tura tih a ni bawk.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian SDO (S), LADC leh CADC - a Sr. Revenue Officer, District Council Conservator of Forest (LADC);  CADC- RSO leh FRO te leh President, Lawngtlai District Village Council Association - te an tel thei a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: Land Revenue & Settlement Minister Launches Online Tax Payment Portal
content:
123/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 29th May, 2026:Land Revenue & Settlement (LR&S) Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova launched the Online Tax Portal Version 2.0 – “landtax.mizoram.gov.in”, an online tax payment portal, at the Directorate of Land Revenue & Settlement Conference Room. This online portal has been developed in collaboration with the Information and Communication Technology (ICT) Department.

Pu Lalchhanzova expressed his happiness that citizens can now pay their taxes more conveniently on their own without the need to visit collection centers physically. He stated that as the world progresses technically, the people of Mizoram are also moving forward together. He emphasized that for a nation to become developed and respectable, citizens need to contribute and pay their taxes diligently. He added that the LR&S Department has begun taking steps toward making Mizoram a self-reliant state. He expressed satisfaction that such technological advancements elevate Mizoram to a better position in national development rankings, ensuring that instead of just emulating other states, steps are being taken so that other states can emulate Mizoram also.

Pu C. Lalrinfela, Informatics Officer of the ICT Department, presenting the technical report, highlighted that the biggest difference from Version 1 is that the system is now entirely based on an Annual Proforma, which clearly calculates the exact tax amount due for citizens on a yearly basis. Through this portal, a system has been designed to send SMS reminders for tax payments and penalty notices for defaulters. Using the Bharat Bill Payment System (BBPS) service available on mobile apps such as GPay, PhonePe, BHIM, Amazon Pay, and others, citizens can now pay Land Tax and Zoramchhiah from the service list using either their Family ID or Ration Card Number.

For updating or linking important records like Ration Card Numbers and Phone Numbers for Land Tax and Zoramchhiah payments, citizens can now submit these through the portal without needing to visit the office in person. To pay Land Tax, using a Family ID is now mandatory, and a search option has been integrated into the portal for those who do not know their Family ID yet. Except for Lawngtlai and Siaha Districts, all other districts have been onboarded, and residents of all onboarded districts can now pay Land Tax and Zoramchhiah online.

In addition to this, several useful features have been added for the convenience of the department staff, the most prominent being:

1. Since Land Tax and Zoramchhiah are now based on the Annual Performa, it will empower staff to generate clearer reports and estimates, as well as track tax compliers and defaulters efficiently.

2. There will be no complications even if the rates and tax assessment amounts are revised in the future.

3. A clear payment record tracking system (Abstract Collection – Online, Manual, Cheque) has been added for Surveyors and manual fee collectors.

4. Tax Targets and Revenue Statistics features have been added for easy viewing, along with a hard report generation feature. A daily collection report viewer has also been included.

5. The system will now automatically block Periodic Patta and House Passes (those with limited validity) exactly past 12:00 midnight once they expire.

6. The system will now log and track every single modification made to the Land Tax and Zoramchhiah master records.

The launching program was chaired by Pu Vanlalmawia, LR&S Secretary, and was attended by ICT Chief Informatics Officer Pu James Lalnunmawia along with other ICT officials and concluded with a vote of thanks proposed by Pu R. Lalthazuala, LR&S Director.

Attachment

title: AIZAWL DISTRICT SPORTS COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
753/2026-2027

Aizawl, 29th May, 2026 :Vawiin khan Aizawl Deputy Commissioner (D.C) PISA PUI HALL ah Aizawl District Sports Committee meeting neih a ni a, Meeting hi Pu Zoremsiama Hmar Addl. DC leh Pi F. Lalnisai. Asst. DC ten an kaihhruaia, Pu Lalngilneia Colney, Member Secretary , leh Pu Lalhmingmawia Sailo. Finance Secretary, Aizawl District Sports Committee ten report an pe bawk.

Vawiin meeting hian India ramin Olympic 2036 thlen tumin hma a lak mek denchhenin Olympic 2036-a Aizawl District atangin infiam mite an tel ve theih ngeina turin hmalak nise tiin a rel a, Aizawl District pualin 21-31 July,2026 chhungin Vikshit Bharat Sports Festival-2026 nei turin ruahmanna siam a ni bawk. Organsing Committee din a ni a, Aizawl District Sports Committee hnuaiah hian Sports Discipline 21 (Sawm hnih pakhat) inziak lut an awm a ni.

title: Land Revenue & Settlement Minister-in Online a Chhiah Pekna Portal Hawng
content:
752/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 29th May, 2026 :Land Revenue & Settlement (LR&S) Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan vawiin khan Directorate of Land Revenue & Settlement Conference Room-ah online-a chhiah pekna portal Online Tax Portal Version 2.0 - “landtax.mizoram.gov.in” a hawng. He online portal hi Information and Communication Technology (ICT) Department-te nena tangkawpa siam a ni a, a hawnna inkhawmah hian ICT Chief Informatics Officer Pu James Lalnunmawia leh ICT official dangte pawh an tel.

Pu Lalchhanzova chuan a hmuna khawn ngai lova mipuite’n mahnia awlsam zawka chhiah an pe thei tawh tur chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, khawvelin chankanna kawngah ke a pen rualin Mizo mipuiten an pen ve zel thei a ni, a ti. Ram hmasawn leh hnam zahawm ni thei turin mipuiten chhiah an pek tam a, an pek that a ngai, a ti a, Mizote chu mahni kea ding thei (self-reliant) ram ni turin LR&S Department chuan hma a la tan a, hetiang technology lama hmasawnna hian India ram puma hmasawnna tehna kawngah pawh dinhmun tha zawkah Mizoram chu a chawikang a, state dangte tih dan en ringawt bik lova state dang te’n min entawn ve theih nan hma lak zel a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi bawk.

Pu C. Lalrinfela, ICT Department-a Informatics Officer chuan technical report a pe a, Version 1 nena a danglamna lian ber chu Annual Performa hmanga siam vek a ni tawh a, hei hi kum bithliaha mipute tan chhiah pek tur zat felfai taka duanna a ni. He portal hmang hian SMS hmangin chhiah pek hun leh chhiah pe lote thinna tur duan a ni a, Bharat Bill Payment System (BBPS) Service awmna mobile app GPay, PhonePe, BHIM, Amazon Pay leh a dangte hmangin Service list atangin Land Tax leh Zoramchhiah chu Family ID emaw Ration Card No. hmangin a pek theih tawh dawn a ni.

Land Tax leh Zoramchhiah pekna atana record pawimawh Ration Card Number leh Phone Number link thar emaw link that ngaite tan office kal kher ngai lovin portal hmangin a thehluh theih tawh dawn a. Land Tax pe tur tan Family ID hmanga pek a ngai tawh dawn a, mahni Family ID la hrelo tan portal ah hian a zawnna dah a ni. Lawngtlai leh Siaha District tih loh chu District zawng zawng an onboard tawh a, district onboard tawh zawng zawng te chuan online hmangin Land Tax leh Zoramchhiah an pe thei tawh dawn a ni.

Heng bakah hian thawktu lam tana tangkai tur belh a awm nual bawk a, a langsar zual te chu:

1. Land Tax leh Zoramchhiah te hi Annual Proforma behchhan a nih taka vang hian report leh estimate felfai zawk siam kawngah leh chhiah pe tha leh thalo chhinchiah kawngah thawktute a tichhak thei dawn a ni.

2. Rate leh Chhiah chawi tur zat thlak (revised) anih pawhin harsatna a awm tawh lo.

3. Surveyor leh Manual Fee collection ti thin tan pawh payment record felfai taka chhinchhiahna (Abstract Collection – Online, Manual, Cheque) belh a ni.

4. Chhiah Target leh Revenue Statistics te hmuh mai theihna belh a ni a, tin hard report generate na belh a ni bawk. Heng bakah hian daily collection report en na siam tel a ni.

5. Periodic Patta leh House Pass (Validity neite) hi automatic-in system hian zar dar 12 pelh chiahin a block nghal zel tawh dawn a ni.

6. Land Tax leh Zoramchhiah master record ah hian tihdanglam (change) awm apiang system hian a chhinchiah zel tawh dawn bawk a ni.

A hawnna inkhawm hi Pu Vanlalmawia, LR&S Secretary chuan a kaihruai a, Pu R. Lalthazuala, LR&S Director chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: MAMIT-AH DCC & DLRC THUKHAWM
content:
751/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit 29th of May,2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall Mamit-ah Pu Suvigya S Chandra,District Bawrhsap hovin District Consultative Committee (DCC) leh District Level Review Committee (DLRC)thutkhawm a ni a. Kum 2026 March Quarter ending chhunga Mamit District-a Bank hrang hrangte hmalakna thlirletna neih a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawm kaihruaitu District Bawrhsap chuan mipui te'n hamthatna leh  chanvo an neih te a hre tur tak mipuiin an hriat theih nan Bank lamte leh Department te'n thawhhona tha tak nena hma kan lak a tul thu sawiin theihtawp chhuah turin a chah a, khaw hla deuha awmte pawh an harsatna ngaihthlak saka sutkian dan kawng zawn a tha a ni a ti.

Bank hrang hrang atanga an hmalakna leh thlen chin agenda point 11 atanga thlirhona neih a ni a. March quarter ending thleng PMJDY hnuaiah Mipa 17374 leh Hmeichhia 21439 an vaiin 38813 ti thar an awm a, PMJJBY Enrollment ti thar 5229 leh Renewal 16628 an awm a, PMSBY ah enrolment ti thar 8846 leh renewal 33310 awmin, APY hnuaia enrolment ti thar 748 an awm bawk. Financial Literacy Camps Bank hrang hrang 14 atangin vawi 42 neih a ni.

Mamit District chhunga Bank hrang hrangte March Quarter-a an Credit Deposit Ratio hi 70.75% a ni a, December Quarter liamta ah khan 72.82% a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian District Credit Plan (DCP) thlirho ni bawkin Agriculture hnuaiah 35.94%, MSE 73.44%, Other PS hnuaiah 39.09% a vaiin 42.82% a ni. Heng bakah hian KCC Loan bank hrang hrang te'n an pek chhuah dan zirchianna neih a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian Pi B.Lalmuansangi District Development Manager,Mamit Nabard   thar chu telin line department te leh Mamit District chhung Bank hrang hrang aiawhte a tel a ni.

Attachment

title: PARAKH Cell hawnna – MBSE
content:
750/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 29thMay, 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram Board of School Education, Chaltlangah PARAKH Cell hawnna hun hman a ni. He Performance Assessment, Review and Analysis of Knowledge for Holistic Development (PARAKH) Cell hawnna hunah hian School Education Minister Dr. Vanlalthlana chu khuallian niin, CEO & Head, PARAKH, NCERT, New Delhi Prof. Indrani Bhaduri chu khualzahawm a ni.

Programme-ah hian khuallian chuan PARAKH hmalaknaa ‘Review leh Analysis of Knowledge’ pawimawh a tih thu a sawi a. Tuna hna kal tam tak buaipui a nih zawhah nasa lehzuala hemi kawnga hmalak a nih theih tur thu a sawi. Tin, state sawrkarin convergence zulzuia zirna leh a kaihhnawiha thawkte zawng zawng huap Quarterly Review meeting neih thin chu a tangkai thu a sawi bawk.

Khualzahawm chuan biak hmuh theihna (video conference) kaltlangin PARAKH pawimawhna leh National Education Policy 2020-in assessment system a ruahman dan te a sawi a. PARAKH chu National Assessment Centre atan Ministry of Education hnuaiah NCERT campus chhunga din a nih thu leh India rama Education Board hrang hrangte assessment system intluktlang zawka kalpui leh competency-based assessment kalpui thei tura buatsaih chu PARAKH tum a ni, a ti.

MBSE Chairman Pu JH Zoremthanga chuan tun hma a NPE 1986 leh NCF 2005 zul zuia zirna kan kalpui thin dan atanga NEP 2020, NCFFS-2022 leh NCFSE-2023 mila zirna kalphung siam danglam a ngai tih uar takin a sawi a. Chutiang hlenchhuak thei tur chuan PARAKH-in State board-te nena thawhhona tha neih leh heng assessment framework, equivalency of boards leh educational reform hrang hrangah kaihhruaina a pe mek tih a sawi bawk.

Programme-ah hian MBSE Secretary Pi Sarah Lalengzami Pachuau chuan PARAKH hmalakna pawimawh thenkhat PARAKH Taxonomy, Holistic Progress Card, State School Standard Authority leh Integrated Test Management System-te a sawifiah bakah hemi kawnga MBSE hma lo lak tawhna hrang hrangte a sawi a. PARAKH Cell hawn tâk chu Mizoramin zirna lama hmasawnna atana hmalakna pawimawh leh assessment system tha zawk siam nana pawimawh tak a nih thu sawiin, PARAKH-in theihtawpa kaihhruaina leh tanpuina an pek avangin lawmthu a sawi bawk a ni.

Attachment
